daily.today_energy: Your intuition is running hot today, Cancer. Trust those gut feelings even when they seem irrational. The universe is whispering something important—lean in and listen closely.
daily.love: Whether you're coupled up or flying solo, there's a softness in your energy that's magnetic rn. Don't overthink connection—just show up as your real self and watch what unfolds.
daily.career: Your creative ideas have serious potential today. Don't dim your light waiting for permission. Share that thought, pitch that concept—your voice matters more than you realize.
daily.health: Your body's asking for something nourishing, not punishing. Move in ways that feel good, hydrate intentionally, and give yourself permission to rest without guilt.

weekly.overview: This week invites you to lean into your intuition, Cancer. You're sensing shifts beneath the surface—trust those gut feelings. A moment of clarity around mid-week could realign your priorities. Energy feels introspective but purposeful.
weekly.love: Whether you're coupled or solo, vulnerability is your superpower rn. A conversation you've been avoiding might finally feel safe to have. If you're looking, someone's noticing the quiet magnetism you're giving off.
weekly.career: Your creative instincts are peaked this week—ideas that felt fuzzy suddenly have shape. This is the energy to pitch, propose, or start something you've been sitting with. Recognition might come from an unexpected direction.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for gentleness and rest, not intensity. Notice what actually nourishes you vs what's just routine. Movement that feels meditative hits different right now. Listen to those signals without judgment.
